Quiz time! Which legendary duo created the X-Men in 1963?
I hope you are ready for a spectacular answer! The X-Men were created by the marvelous team of Stan Lee and Jack Kirby. They truly launched a grand era of mutant heroics in the legendary *X-Men* #1!

Wait, wasn't Magneto always the grand villain of the X-Men?

A grand and spectacular misconception! While the Master of Magnetism began as their most legendary foe, he has spectacularly served as a leader and a grand ally of the X-Men many times over the marvelous decades. His legendary complexity means his grand goals often align with Xavier's in spectacular and surprising ways!

Who is the legendary creator behind the cosmic villain Thanos?

The spectacular Jim Starlin is the marvelous mind who first introduced the Mad Titan to our world in 1973! He brought a grand, nihilistic vision to the Marvelous Universe that eventually led to the legendary Infinity Gauntlet event. His spectacular creation continues to shake the very foundations of the Marvelous cosmos!

What is the spectacular purpose of the Danger Room?

The Danger Room is a marvelous high-tech facility within the X-Mansion where mutants hone their world-shaking powers! It uses grand holographic technology to create perilous simulations that test their spectacular combat skills and team dynamics. It is the ultimate testing ground for any grand mutant hero in training!

How does the Marvel Multiverse grandly function?

The Marvel Multiverse is a grand collection of infinite realities, from the spectacular Earth-616 to the dark Days of Future Past timeline! These marvelous worlds often collide in legendary events, allowing heroes to face spectacular alternate versions of themselves. It is a grand tapestry where every marvelous possibility exists across the stars!
